evals.name: luma-ai-diary
evals.prompt: 帮我做个落地页，我的产品叫 Luma，是个 AI 日记 app。风格我想要首尔那种感觉，干净但有表达力。需要 Hero、功能介绍、用户评价、下载 CTA 这几个板块。排版气质选叙事型。Nav 选底���磁性胶囊。
evals.expected_output: Multi-file landing page: index.html + style.css + main.js + assets/icons.svg. Seoul city style applied. Bottom pill nav with magnetic effect. GSAP ScrollTrigger animations. No white backgrounds. No rectangular section dividers.

assertions.description: 输出包含 index.html、style.css、main.js、assets/icons.svg 四个文件
index.html 中包含 GSAP CDN script 标签
main.js 中使用了 ScrollTrigger
style.css 中没有 background: #ffffff 或 background: white
style.css 中至少一处使用了 clip-path 或 border-radius 在 section 上
包含 pill-nav 或 bottom pill 样式的导航，position: fixed，bottom 定位
assets/icons.svg 存在且包含 <symbol> 元素
style.css 使用 CSS 自定义属性（:root { --xxx }）定义设计系统

evals.name: terroir-coffee
evals.prompt: 帮我做一个咖啡品牌的官网首页，品牌叫 Terroir，主打单一产区精品豆。风格想要巴黎那种有年代感但不老气的感觉。需要 Hero、品牌故事、产品系列、门店地址这几个板块。排版气质选铺张型（大字铺屏，视觉冲击）。Nav 选侧边垂直型。
evals.expected_output: Multi-file landing page with Paris city style. Vertical side rail nav. Bold oversized typography. Serif display font. Warm ecru/cream color palette. Clip-path section dividers. GSAP animations.

assertions.description: 输出包含 index.html、style.css、main.js、assets/icons.svg 四个文件
style.css 或 index.html 中引用了衬线字体（Playfair、Cormorant、或其他 serif）
包含侧边垂直导航（writing-mode: vertical 或 position:fixed + left 定位）
CSS 变量中包含暖色系值（#f2ece0、#f5ede0 或类似的米白/奶油色）
style.css 中 h1 或 display 字号使用了 clamp() 且最大值 ≥ 5rem
index.html 中包含 GSAP CDN script 标签
assets/icons.svg 存在且包含 <symbol> 元素

evals.name: forge-devtool
evals.prompt: Build me a landing page for a developer tool called Forge — it's a local-first database for teams. I want Tokyo Night style: dark, electric, precise. Sections: Hero, 3 key Features, How it works (step-through), Pricing tiers, CTA. Layout: theatrical (sticky scroll scenes). Nav: full-screen blast menu.
evals.expected_output: Multi-file landing page with Tokyo Night style. Dark background (#08060f or similar). Neon accent colors. Full-screen overlay menu with GSAP animation. Sticky scroll step-through section. Monospace or geometric sans font. Grid texture background.

assertions.description: Output contains index.html, style.css, main.js, assets/icons.svg
CSS has a dark background color (#08 or #0a or #0b range in the first 2 hex chars)
main.js or index.html contains a full-screen overlay nav with open/close animation
main.js contains a sticky scroll / step-through section using ScrollTrigger
GSAP and ScrollTrigger CDN scripts are loaded in index.html
style.css contains a grid or scanline background texture
style.css contains box-shadow with rgba color for a glow effect

evals.name: zen-wellness-dark-tone
evals.prompt: 帮我做一个冥想 App 的落地页，产品叫 ZenFlow。风格选京都。色调选暗黑版。需要 Hero、功能介绍、定价、FAQ、CTA。Nav 选拆分居中型。
evals.expected_output: Multi-file landing page with Kyoto style in dark tone variant. Split centered nav. Dark background derived from Kyoto palette. Pricing section with toggle. FAQ accordion. Serif display font.

assertions.description: 输出包含 index.html、style.css、main.js、assets/icons.svg 四个文件
style.css :root 中 --bg 使用深色值（#0 或 #1 开头的 hex），不是京都默认的暖白色
index.html 包含 split-nav 或居中 logo + 两侧链接的导航结构
index.html 包含定价板块，有至少 2 个价格卡片
index.html 包含 FAQ 板块，有 aria-expanded 或 data-open 手风琴交互
index.html 包含独立的 CTA 板块（不是 hero 内的按钮）
index.html 中包含 GSAP CDN script 标签

evals.name: aurora-saas-en
evals.prompt: Build a landing page for Aurora, a SaaS analytics platform. Style: let the AI choose the best city. Sections: Hero (product demo type), Features (bento grid), Testimonials, Pricing with monthly/annual toggle, FAQ, CTA. Nav: bottom magnetic pill.
evals.expected_output: Multi-file landing page. AI selects a city style autonomously and explains the choice. Product demo hero with step-through. Bento grid features. Pricing with billing toggle. English copy throughout.

assertions.description: Output contains index.html, style.css, main.js, assets/icons.svg
Agent explicitly states which city it chose and why (not __AI_CHOOSE__ left as placeholder)
index.html contains a product demo / step-through hero section with multiple steps
style.css contains grid-template with span or grid-column: span for bento layout
index.html contains monthly/annual toggle with data-monthly and data-annual attributes
index.html body text is primarily in English (not placeholder lorem ipsum)
style.css defines at least two distinct font-family values (--font-display and --font-body)

evals.name: monet-non-city-description
evals.prompt: 帮我做一个艺术画廊的落地页，品牌叫 Lumière Gallery。不要选城市，我想要的感觉是：莫奈睡莲 + 清晨薄雾 + 亚麻布质感。需要 Hero、展览介绍、艺术家评价、联系方式。Nav 选全屏爆开式。
evals.expected_output: Multi-file landing page. Non-city description processed through imagery-derivation.md to derive a custom design token system. Monet-inspired soft palette. Full-screen blast menu nav. Linen texture background.

assertions.description: 输出包含 index.html、style.css、main.js、assets/icons.svg 四个文件
style.css 中的颜色不是任何已有城市的默认配色（非直接复制 city-styles.md 的某个城市）
style.css --accent 值是柔和色调（非高饱和霓虹色），符合莫奈/薄雾意境
main.js 包含全屏菜单动画（clipPath inset 或类似的 overlay 展开）
style.css 包含 background-image 纹理（feTurbulence、repeating-linear-gradient 或类似）
index.html 中包含 GSAP CDN script 标签

evals.name: multipage-portfolio
evals.prompt: 帮我做一个作品集网站，品牌叫 PixelFrame，是个摄影师个人站。风格选里斯本。需要首页 Hero + 作品集画廊 + 关于我 + 联系方式。要求生成多页面站点，包含 about.html 和 contact.html。Nav 选磁性胶囊。
evals.expected_output: Multi-page site with Lisbon style. index.html + about.html + contact.html generated. Gallery section on index. Magnetic pill nav shared across pages.

assertions.description: 输出包含 index.html、about.html、contact.html 三个 HTML 文件
about.html 和 contact.html 包含与 index.html 相同结构的导航栏
index.html 包含画廊或作品集板块（gallery/portfolio class 或 grid 布局）
所有页面共享相同的 CSS 变量（--bg、--accent 等值一致）
index.html 中包含 GSAP CDN script 标签

evals.name: dark-mode-toggle-ja
evals.prompt: ランディングページを作って。製品は NightOwl という睡眠トラッカーアプリ。東京ナイトスタイルで。ダークモード切替を含めて。セクション：Hero、機能紹介、料金、CTA。ナビは全画面展開式。
evals.expected_output: Landing page with Tokyo Night style. Dark mode toggle included. Full-screen blast nav. Japanese product copy. Pricing section.

assertions.description: Output contains index.html, style.css, main.js, assets/icons.svg
main.js or index.html contains dark mode toggle logic (data-theme switching)
style.css :root uses dark background color (Tokyo Night starts dark)
Full-screen overlay nav with open/close animation
index.html contains pricing section with at least 2 tiers
Agent correctly activated from Japanese trigger phrase

evals.name: minimal-input-resilience
evals.expected_output: Agent asks clarifying questions about the product or proceeds with reasonable defaults. Should not crash or produce empty output from minimal input.

assertions.description: Agent responds coherently without errors or empty output
Agent either asks follow-up questions about Acme or generates a page with sensible defaults
Agent offers city style selection or auto-selects with explanation
